problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: The key to How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? is Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells — specifically Telomerase activation/inhibition in — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
